chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Criminal Transfer Application No. 18 of 2023 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For orders on M.A No.1865/2023. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 09.08.2023 Ms. Rubina Qadir, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh. -x-x-x-x-x- None present except Deputy P.G, Sindh. Same was the position of last date. It appear that the purpose, for which instant application was filed, has been served or the applicant has lost his interest in the proceedings, therefore, he and his counsel have chosen to remain absent instead of pursuing it vigilantly. Consequently and in view of above, instant Application is hereby dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. JUDGE Zulfiqar/P.A
